title: Regency Centers Invites You to Join Its First Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., March 30, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regency Centers Corporation (The “Company”) (NASDAQ: REG) will announce its First Quarter 2023 earnings results on Thursday, May 4, 2023, after the market closes. The Company's earnings release and supplemental information package will be posted on the Investor Relations section of the Company's website – investors.regencycenters.com. The Company will host an earnings conference call on Friday, May 5, 2023, at 11:00 a.m. ET.

title: REITs: Internal Vs. External Growth
text: Two ways REITs can raise cash for investment are by selling stock or by retaining earnings. Each can, in the right circumstances, produce a large rate of growth.

title: Regency Centers Announces Leadership Promotions and Expanded Roles
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., March 21, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regency Centers Corporation (“Regency” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq:REG) today announced the following leadership promotions, effective as of March 13, 2023.

title: Regency Centers: A Grocery Anchored Bargain Buy
text: REG is a high quality REIT with desirable properties and strong tenant base. It has lease terms averaging 5 years, allowing it to adjust leasing rates in response to higher inflation.

title: Should You Retain Regency (REG) Stock in Your Portfolio Now?
text: Regency's (REG) focus on grocery-anchored shopping centers, expansion efforts and a solid balance sheet bode well for growth. Higher e-commerce adoption and rising interest rates are worrisome.

title: How To Allocate $25,000 Among 10 Dividend Income And Dividend Growth Companies And ETFs
text: In this article, I will show you how you could allocate $25,000 among 10 dividend income and dividend growth companies as well as ETFs. The 10 selected picks provide you with a Weighted Average Dividend Yield [TTM] of 3.25% while they have shown a Weighted Average Dividend Growth Rate of 9.30%.

title: Shop Till Ya Drop
text: Americans love to shop. Buying stuff is a part of this country's DNA.

title: 5 Top High-Yield Stocks to Sail Through a Choppy March
text: As markets gyrate on inflationary pressure, invest in dividend stocks like Regency Centers (REG), Prudential Financial (PRU), Omnicom Group (OMC), NiSource (NI) & NewJersey Resources (NJR) for a steady income.
